name: Fiery
description: A bold, exotic hot sauce with a smoky heat. Made with hand-picked peppers and a secret blend of spices.
usage_notes: Perfect drizzled over grilled meats, tacos, or eggs. Pairs beautifully with cheese boards. Use sparingly — a little goes a long way.

name: Mile
description: A mellow, versatile sauce with deep umami notes. The everyday hero of the KRU lineup.
usage_notes: Use as a marinade, finishing sauce, or dip. Great for weeknight dinners, sandwiches, and bowl meals.
